/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -fPIC -ftemplate-depth=256 -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/agent-tests.dir/__/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/agent-tests.dir/agent_checks_tests.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/agent-tests.dir/agent_services_tests.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/agent-tests.dir/agent_other_tests.cpp.o" -o ../../output/agent-tests  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/lee1y/Desktop/CloudDisk_v5/lib/ppconsul-0.2.3/out/output ../../output/libppconsul.0.1.dylib
